user.title: OpenWrt Ubus WiFi Presence
user.description: Configure connection to OpenWrt ubus API.

data_description.tracking_mode: known_or_alias tracks alias and Home Assistant-known devices. all tracks every observed WiFi client, while aliases still take priority.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate OpenWrt Ubus WiFi Presence
reauth_confirm.description: Update credentials for OpenWrt router at {host}.

data_description.ip_address: Optional override for the actual connection. Leave empty to keep using the configured host value.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable only when the router uses a self-signed or otherwise untrusted certificate.
data_description.endpoint: Relative ubus path. The default OpenWrt value is `ubus`.

error.invalid_alias_mapping_ui: Invalid alias mapping in UI YAML

abort.already_configured: This OpenWrt host is already configured

data_description.tracking_mode: known_or_alias tracks alias and Home Assistant-known devices. all tracks every observed WiFi client, while aliases still take priority.
